title: Dominic — sadistic-doctor nightmare, drug damage, attending meetings
html:
Dominic — sadistic-doctor nightmare, drug damage, attending meetings

Source: 2024-10-31 Apple Note. The first Dominic note — written from Shanghai, on call with him as he describes a torture-nightmare. Predates the June 2025 collapse note by 8 months.

TL;DR

  • Dominic is "in a twisted psychological chamber. Living alone, clearly doing hard drugs has fucked him up massively."
  • Dominic shares a nightmare on the call: a sadistic doctor mentally tortures him, forces him to say things he doesn't want to say, punishes him if he doesn't.
  • Yahir's read: "Poor fucking soul rn. He's doing some right things by attending meetings and properly seeking help."
  • Yahir's regret: "I regret not staying in touch the last few years when this developed, but it's too late to think about that now."
  • Yahir's commitment: "Rebuild Dominic, you have found strength and it's time."
  • 8 months later in the June 2025 update, Dominic has gotten worse — gone from "attending meetings" to "brain dead potato lying in bed." The arc bends down, not up.

Pattern observed

This is the first half of the Dominic arc in the corpus. Oct 2024 = active recovery effort (meetings, calls); June 2025 = full dissociation. Yahir as the outside-the-system witness documenting a family member's mental decline at distance — very different voice from manifesto-Yahir or operator-Yahir. Soft, regretful, hopeful.

This note is also one of the few direct on-call documentation moments in the corpus — Yahir is processing in real-time during the conversation.

Open questions

  • "Hard drugs" — what specifically? (Not specified.)
  • The meetings — AA, NA, both?
  • What's Yahir's actual relationship to Dominic? Cousin? Family-friend brother-figure? (Per the Bubbas note, Sammy is Dominic's brother and Yahir is processing as if family-adjacent.)

Related

  • dominic
  • sammy
  • 2025 06 21 on bubbas dominic — the worsened follow-up
  • mental health in the family
  • yahir family
  • shanghai study abroad — the geographic distance during the call
